extraction_metadata.note: The source data contained limited actual customer reviews. The Amazon scrape captured primarily product listings and descriptions rather than full review pages. Only 5 verified customer reviews were available in the data.

quotes.quote: Worked great with my golf swing trainer.
The 50g weight is useless, the original club already has one and you can't use both at once. Would have been five stars without this glitch
Perfect for a good warm up before the course
Weights for swing club it's works.

Love the product. One thing, I ordered additional weights and they include another weighted end cap which is a bit of a waste because you can only use one cap at a time. Should have been three interior weights.

quotes.note: Manufacturer marketing claim, not customer review

quotes.quote: Speed Sticks used by Padraig Harrington
quotes.note: Manufacturer marketing claim, not customer review

quotes.quote: 2-IN-1 TRAINING SYSTEM: STRENGTH & SPEED: Train smarter, not harder. 2 interchangeable chutes - complete performance edge. Blue: Build core strength and swing stability. Black: Improve technique, speed, and explosive release.
quotes.note: Manufacturer product description, not customer review

quotes.quote: 360 ROTATION TECHNOLOGY: The only trainer with 360 aerodynamic resistance for full backswing and downswing engagement. Air resistance trains your swing sequence, timing, and lag, building more power, accuracy, and distance.
quotes.note: Manufacturer product description, not customer review

quotes.quote: NO ADDED WEIGHT, NO SWING DISTORTION: The Powerchute slides directly onto your own driver or wood, letting you train with your actual club for real results—while engaging fast twitch muscles critical to generating speed.
quotes.note: Manufacturer product description, not customer review

quotes.quote: CO-DESIGNED BY DAVID LEADBETTER the world-renowned instructor and coach to 11 major champions. Used by all skill level golfers - from weekend warriors to world record holders. Train with real science backed by elite results.
quotes.note: Manufacturer product description, not customer review

products_found_in_data.product: Orange Whip Full-Sized Golf Swing Trainer
products_found_in_data.description: Swing Trainer and swing tempo aid

data_limitations.issue: Limited customer review content in scraped data
data_limitations.explanation: The Amazon search results primarily captured product listing pages rather than dedicated review pages. Most pages contained product descriptions, pricing, and star ratings but not the full text of customer reviews.
data_limitations.recommendation: For more comprehensive Amazon review extraction, consider: (1) Scraping dedicated product review pages (amazon.com/product-reviews/ASIN), (2) Using Amazon's Product Advertising API, or (3) Searching for review aggregator sites that compile Amazon reviews.
data_limitations.reviews_available: Only 5 verified customer reviews were extracted from the available data, all for the HH-GOLF Swing Speed Trainer Weights accessory product rather than the main speed training systems like SuperSpeed.
